vo_text: Born on July 18? Your card is the 10 of Clubs — and its shadow side explains a lot. In Cardology it's called The Master Builder. You're the intellectual master. You've thought deeply and built significantly. The shadow side? You rest on your intellectual accomplishments and stop growing. You think you've figured it out, so you stop questioning. Your gift? Intellectual mastery and deep expertise. Plus ability to radiate confidence and competence. You're learning to stay humble and curious despite your accomplishments. Find your own card free — link in bio. Card Blueprints.

title: Born July 18? Your Birth Card Is the 10 of Clubs #shorts
